titleStmt.title: SII 23.355: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 355. (A.R. No. 355 of 1907.) Tiruviśalūr, Kumbhakonam Taluk, Tanjavur District Śivayōganātha temple—on the second gōpura, right of entrance Kṛishṇadēva-Mahārāja: date lost

summary.p: This is much damaged. It is one of the several copies of the inscription of the king found in many of the temples giving a list of his conquests over his enemy kings and of the beneficiary temples, both Śiva and Vishṇu, which he exempted from the payment of jōḍi and śūlavari taxes due from them to the king, which is said to have amounted in all to 10000 varāhas of gold. Tiruviśalūr being one such temple, the inscription is also incised here.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
rācciyastāpaṉācāriya piratāparuttira gecapati sapta
śrīvirakṛṣṇayatevamakārāyar coḻamaṇṭalattu
Āṉa teyvasthāṉattukku coṭi cūlavariyu
yirāyasam nāmum narasā
varkku vicayapūpati
tirumalai rākutta rāyaṉaiyum piṭittu
ṇṭai pellamukoṇṭaiko
mutalāṉa tuṟkaṅkaḷum kaykkoṇ
�ṉa kecapati piṟatāṉaṉ pūpati
vaṉmutalāṉa pāttiventi piṭittukko
ṇṭu piṟatāparuttira gecapatiyai poṭṭu
ṉūrile jeyastampamum niṟutti coḻamaṇṭalamum koyiṟ
cantirarekai tirukkāṭṭuppaḷḷi tirunākicura
ṇṇakar ḷanākaṉ tirup tiruveḻuntūr
centavaṉmaṅkalam tirumāṇikuḻi tiruppattūr tirumāṇikuḻi tirup
paikuṭi tirunāraiyūr kāṭṭūr muḷḷūr tiyākavalli cirāmaviṇṇakar pantaṇanal
lūr tiruveḷḷiyaṅkuṭi tirucceṅkāṭu kuṟucci tiruppuṅkūr tiṉa nāyakam tevatāṉam
tirumaṅkalakkuṭi tiruvicalūr tiruttutevaṉkuṭi cūriyanāyaṉār koyil tirukkoṭikā
kuṟṟālam ciṟukuṭi tirukkuṟṟavācal nāviṟkuṭi Āccāpuram tirumuṉputtūr tiruvirapūṇṭi
koyil keṅkaikoṇṭam tirumeccūr mutalāṉa coḻamaṇṭalattu māṇṭāṟṟūr
puvantipaṭṭiṇacciṟmaiyil cciṟmai tañcāvūrciṟmai viramaṭakki paṭṭaccirmai
mutalāṉa civastāṉam viṣṇustāṉam Uḷpaṭa teyvastāṉaṅkaḷilum mutalāka Arai
maṉaikku Iṟuttuvarukiṟa coṭi yaracupeṟumaiyum Eppeṟpaṭṭa pala Upāti yum Uḷpaṭa
varākaṉ 10000 yinta varākam patiṉāyiramum Anta Anta deyvastāṉaṅkaḷe saṅ
kiṟāntipuṇya kālattile kiruṣṇaveṇitirattile viṇṭa ka caṉṉa
tiyilum bhecavāṭai mallikāṟccuṉa tevacaṉṉitiyilum Ā rvam Āka
saṟuvamāṉyam Āka viṭṭu
śāta Ellā teyvastānaṅkaḷilum cilācātaṉamum paṇṇi pūcai puṉaṟkāramum
Aṅkaraṅkavaipokam tiruppaṇikaḷum Ācantirārkkastāhiāka sā �ka naṭa
ttikkoṇṭu sukattileyirukkavum yinta taṉmattukku yātoruttar Akutam pa
ṇṇiṉaperkaḷ kaṅkaikkaraiyile mātāpitāvaiyum goppiramāṇarai yum
koṉṟa pāpattile pokakkaṭavarkaḷ Ākavum
pālanam paradattāpakareṇa svadattam niṣphalam bhavetī .
Digital edition of SII 23.355 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
